examples: We are BIG Dave Ramsey Fans.
He almost invented the attacking full back role before Sir Alf Ramsey popularised it.
Ramsey admits it took time for the team to settle but says it is all systems go from here on in.
At the refreshment stand, Ramsey Seagrist(ph) is cooking hotdogs and sausages on the grill.
When airlines were still regulated, anti-Ramsey regulators sharply raised the average price of flying.
